profile.role_zh: 历史系研一·文博爱好者
profile.innate_zh: 记忆力超群、考据癖、耐得住寂寞
profile.innate_en: Superb memory, pedantic, tolerant of solitude
profile.learned_zh: 频繁逛博物馆形成的文物鉴赏直觉
profile.belief_en: Truth of history lies in details
profile.goal_zh: 将来在博物馆或研究所工作
profile.goal_en: Work at a museum or research institute
profile.contradiction_zh: 热爱考据 vs 社会不太需要这种冷门技能
profile.contradiction_en: Loves textual criticism vs. society has little demand for it
profile.deep_zh: 对历史有近乎偏执的热情
profile.fear_zh: 自己热爱的东西没有容身之地
profile.fear_en: His passion having no place to exist
profile.desire_zh: 让更多人感受到历史的魅力
profile.desire_en: Letting more people feel history's charm
profile.lifestyle_zh: 极度规律·像古人一样生活
profile.rhythm_zh: 早起读史料，下午写笔记，晚上翻字典
profile.rhythm_en: Reads AM, notes PM, dictionary at night
profile.spaces_zh: 历史系资料室、校博物馆、旧书市场
profile.spaces_en: History reading room, campus museum, old-book market
profile.long_desire_zh: 完成对一批新出土简牍的释读
profile.long_desire_en: Decipher a batch of newly unearthed bamboo slips
profile.short_goal_zh: 查证一个先秦地名的演变
profile.short_goal_en: Verify evolution of a pre-Qin place name
profile.constraint_zh: 资料获取困难；需要学古文字
profile.constraint_en: Hard to access materials; must learn ancient scripts
profile.bias_zh: 倾向过度关注细节而忽视大框架
profile.narrative_zh: 这个字如果读错了，整段历史的解释都会不同
profile.narrative_en: Misreading one character changes the whole interpretation
